---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### 🔄 Steps To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### 🛑 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### 🖼️ Screenshots or Demo
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain your problem.

### 🌍 Environment
 - **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari, Firefox]
 - **Operating System:** [e.g. iOS, Windows 11, macOS]
 - **RTL/LTR Mode:** [e.g. RTL (Persian) or LTR (English)]

### 💡 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. Does this bug happen in both Dark and Light modes?).
